query:
SELECT 
  p.status AS pdi_status,
  CASE WHEN pv.id IS NOT NULL THEN 'SIM' ELSE 'NÃO' END AS tem_validacao,
  COUNT(*) AS quantidade
FROM pdis p
JOIN users u ON p.colaboradorId = u.id
LEFT JOIN pdi_validacoes pv ON pv.pdiId = p.id
WHERE u.role = 'lider'
GROUP BY p.status, CASE WHEN pv.id IS NOT NULL THEN 'SIM' ELSE 'NÃO' END
ORDER BY p.status;
